text:
```yaml infra-staging-egreen/workspace/ftp.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-config
data:
  SFTPGO_FTPD__LISTEN_PORT: "21"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__DRIVER: "postgresql"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__NAME: "sftpgo"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__HOST: "db-sftpgo"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__USERNAME: "sftpgo"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__PASSWORD: "sftpgociw8sWECsfgdd29fH2nwhkB"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__POOL_SIZE: "10"
  SFTPGO_HTTPD__BRANDING__NAME: "eGreen FTP server"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-secret
type: Opaque
data:
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__PASSWORD: c2Z0cGdvY2l3OHNXRUNzZmdkZDI5Zkgybndoa0I= # Base64-encoded value
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: sftpgo
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  ports:
    - port: 21
      targetPort: 21
      protocol: TCP
      name: ftp
  selector:
    app: sftpgo
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: sftpgo
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: sftpgo
  serviceName: "sftpgo"
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: sftpgo
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: sftpgo
          image: drakkan/sftpgo:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 21
              name: ftp
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
              name: sftpgo-config
            - secretRef:
              name: sftpgo-secret
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 10Gi
```

add postgres statefulset
Here is the XML patch to add a PostgreSQL StatefulSet to the configuration:

```xml
<patch>
<title>Add PostgreSQL StatefulSet</title>
<edit>
<path>infra-staging-egreen/workspace/ftp.yaml</path>
<description>Add a PostgreSQL StatefulSet for database persistence</description>
<operation>insert_after</operation>
<old_text>
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 10Gi
</old_text>
<new_text>
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: postgres
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: postgres
  serviceName: "postgres"
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: postgres
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: postgres
          image: postgres:15
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
              name: postgres
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_DB
              value: sftpgo
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              value: sftpgo
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: sftpgo-secret
                  key: SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__PASSWORD
          volumeMounts:
            - name: postgres-data
              mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: postgres-data
      spec:
        accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 10Gi
</new_text>
</edit>
</patch>
```
```yaml infra-staging-egreen/workspace/ftp.yaml

            - name: POSTGRES_USER

            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD

          volumeMounts:
            - name: postgres-data

  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: postgres-data
      spec:
        accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
        resources:
```

add service for postgres
Here is the XML patch to add a Service for the PostgreSQL StatefulSet:

```xml
<patch>
<title>Add PostgreSQL Service</title>
<edit>
<path>infra-staging-egreen/workspace/ftp.yaml</path>
<description>Add a Service to expose the PostgreSQL StatefulSet</description>
<operation>insert_after</operation>
<old_text>
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: postgres-data
      spec:
        accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 10Gi
</old_text>
<new_text>
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: db-sftpgo
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
      protocol: TCP
      name: postgres
  selector:
    app: db-sftpgo
</new_text>
</edit>
</patch>
```
/
